llvm::PBQPRAConstraint Class Referenceabstract

Abstract base for classes implementing PBQP register allocation constraints (e.g. Spill-costs, interference, coalescing). More...

Detailed Description

Abstract base for classes implementing PBQP register allocation constraints (e.g. Spill-costs, interference, coalescing).
